title: abutilon sinense var. typica
intro: Abutilon sinense var. typica, also known as the Chinese thistle or velvet leaf abutilon, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abutilon sinense var. typica include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating various ailments such as skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like tea, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
